highlights.text: In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a great example of my core setup that we had on Friday (a Failed Breakdown) which ultimately caused the strength we saw Friday into today.
Its essential to see as many Failed Breakdowns as possible to internalize them.

As long as this structure is in tact, we are en route to 6074 target #1, 6082 target #2, then 6102-6106 target #3.” We hit 6106 Wednesday, and since then have been building out a new pattern: A 3 day “megaphone” pattern, and I wrote Friday at 4pm: “After a big rally this week we are now consolidating in a large megaphone pattern with support 6064-68, resistance 6117, and a 6081 mid-pivot.

post_title: Biggest Sell For SPX Since November 15th. Will It Get Bought? Dec 10 Plan
